title: Board
selectHint: The board is per-project. Pick one to start:

newCardDialog.title: New card
newCardDialog.titlePlaceholder: e.g. Wire up GitHub OAuth login
newCardDialog.descPlaceholder: User story, requirements, acceptance criteria, references… Claude reads this on launch.
newCardDialog.descHint: Markdown supported. If empty, Claude only has the title to work from.
newCardDialog.skillsHint: Which skills to load (frontmatter `skills:`). Optional — workers fall back to project-level skills.
newCardDialog.loadFailed: Failed to load skills (won't block create): {{error}}
newCardDialog.dispatchOff: Default off: card lands in Planning; drag it to Backlog to start work.
newCardDialog.dispatchOn: Checked: skip staging — the next tick dispatches a worker.

cardModal.labelsNote: Note: AI-PIPELINE / STARTED-* / COMPLETED-* / NEEDS-FIX are managed by the pipeline — manual edits may be overwritten.
cardModal.checklistEmpty: No checklist items. Add them in the description with `- [ ] item` syntax.
cardModal.descNote: Replaces only the "## Description" section; Checklist and Log sections are untouched.
cardModal.doneCannotStart: Card is done — drag it back to Todo before starting
cardModal.pipelineRunningCannotStart: Pipeline is running — supervisor dispatches automatically, no manual start needed
cardModal.resetBody: Card state will reset to initial, and completed checklist items will be cleared.
cardModal.deleteBody: About to delete "{{title}}". This is permanent — the md file will be physically removed. Continue?
cardModal.deleteFinalBody: Please confirm again to delete card #{{seq}}.

errors.resetBody: This clears every card's run state, worker markers, and branches. Cannot be undone.
errors.isRunning: Card is running; kill the worker or move it out of In progress first.
